final_prompt.prompt:
Design a logo for a sweet shop called "doces da Lis".

Style/medium: flat vector logo illustration, Hello Kitty and Friends character style
Composition: cute cat centered on top of the logo, lily flower on the cat's head, shop name displayed below in a cute and pretty font
Subject: a chocolate-brown-toned cute cat in Hello Kitty and Friends style, with a yellow lily flower on its head, sitting above the text "doces da Lis"
Scene/backdrop: soft baby yellow and candy pink background
Lighting/mood: sweet, cute, charming
Color palette: baby yellow and candy pink background, chocolate brown cat, yellow lily flower
Materials/textures: flat vector, smooth shapes
Text (verbatim): doces da Lis
Constraints: cat style must closely reference Hello Kitty and Friends aesthetic; font must look cute and pretty
Avoid: realistic textures, dark tones, complex backgrounds
